action_items.task: Send the SOC 2 report to Mark / Northwind security team.
action_items.evidence_quote: I'll send the SOC 2 report to you by end of day today.

action_items.task: Send Northwind's security questionnaire to Jess for completion.
action_items.evidence_quote: I'll have it over to you by Friday for sure.

action_items.task: Spin up a sandbox environment for Northwind's team to test the new ingestion API; send credentials to Mark's eng lead.
action_items.evidence_quote: yeah I can have a sandbox ready for your team by Monday. I'll send the credentials to your eng lead.

non_commitments.text: Prioritizing SSO with Okta on the roadmap
non_commitments.why_not: Jess said 'I'll see what our roadmap team thinks... I can't promise timing.' — explicit hedge, the action ('see what they think') is too vague to be a tracked commitment with a date.

non_commitments.text: Northwind increasing seat count next quarter
non_commitments.why_not: Mark said 'we might increase seats next quarter, depending on how Q2 closes' — explicit hedge ('might', 'depending').

non_commitments.text: Multi-region rollout for Northwind in H2
non_commitments.why_not: Mark explicitly said 'we'll consider the multi-region thing... Not committing yet.'

non_commitments.text: Scheduling a follow-up call in ~a month
non_commitments.why_not: No concrete date; Mark said 'a month-ish' and is delegating to his assistant — not a tracked commitment with a deadline.
